title: Cuneiform Tablet #0034: Old Akkadian Adoption
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Akkadian period — a adoption document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Akkadian period — a adoption document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Akkadian period. Adoption document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records adoption matters typical of Old Akkadian period administrative or literary practice.
